calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights
Off Calendar Feb-07-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS, LLC's Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights

Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Robert Cohen, Esq. appearing for the plaintiff;
Te'jon Moody, Payee, appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

Hearing was held. Having reviewed the papers, and having been satisfied with terms of the contract, the court grants the petition for approval for transfer of payment rights.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights
Off Calendar Jan-25-2023 Continued To Feb-07-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
